revision.text:
'''辛巳'''（かのとみ、しんし）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて18番目で、前は[[庚辰]]、次は[[壬午]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は金、[[十二支]]の五行は火で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（火剋金）である。
==辛巳の年==
==辛巳の日== ===[[選日]]=== 辛巳の日は[[犯土|小土]]の5日目である。

'''辛巳'''（かのとみ、しんし）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて18番目で、前は[[庚辰]]、次は[[壬午]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は金、[[十二支]]の五行は火で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（火剋金）である。
==辛巳の年==
==辛巳の日== ===[[選日]]=== 辛巳の日は[[犯土|小土]]の4日目である。

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Metall-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de métal]][[hak:Sîn-sṳ]][[ja:辛巳]][[ko:신사 (간지)]][[nds:Metall-Snaak]][[vi:Tân Tỵ]][[za:Sinceih]][[zh_min_nan:Sin-sū]][[zh_yue:辛巳]][[zh:辛巳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062057]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Snake|kanji=辛巳|romaji=kanoto mi|onyomi=shinshi|p=xīnsì|w=hsin-ssu|mi=ɕin⁵³ sɨ|y=san1 si6|j=san1 si6|ci=sɐn siː|mc=sin si|oc-bs=sin slɯʔ|qq=}} {{Referencesの明記| date = 2021st year 6月|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Kanotomi''' (辛巳) (pronounced ka-no-to-mi, shin-kin-no-mi, or shin-shi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 18th of the combined sets of the Ten Heavenly Stems and Twelve Earthly Branches. The one before it is {{ill|Kōshin (庚辰)|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin (庚辰)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the one after it is {{ill|Jingo (壬午)|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jingo (壬午)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-yang and Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-yang and Five Elements|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] element {{ill|Kanoto (辛)|lt=Shin (辛)|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of metal, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Mi (巳)|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mi (巳)|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of fire. Under the concept of {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, fire subdues metal (火剋金).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: shinji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhsa (신사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとみ (kanoto-mi) ***Onyomi: しんかのみ (shinka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Snake== A Gregorian calendar year that, when divided by 60, has a remainder of 21 is a Kanotomi year. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanotomi Years''' |- !1st Millennium!!2nd Millennium!!3rd Millennium |- | *21 *81 *141 *201 *261 *321 *381 *441 *501 *561 *621 *681 *741 *801 *861 *921 *981 | *1041 *1101 *1161 *1221 *1281 *1341 *1401 *1461 *1521 *1581 *1641 *1701 *1761 *1821 *1881 *1941 | *2001 *2061 *2121 *2181 *2241 *2301 *2361 *2421 *2481 *2541 *2601 *2661 *2721 *2781 *2841 *2901 *2961 |}
==Months of Yin Metal Snake== In the Gregorian calendar, during years ending in 0 or 5 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kō (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the fourth month (April) is the Kanotomi month. Note that this can refer to the month in the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the “solar term” month (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Snake== A Kanotomi day is associated with the following selection day (選日).
=== Auspicious Days === On a Kanotomi day, it is the fourth day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土#小土|lt_ja=小土|lt=Shōdo|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Kanotomi''' (辛巳) (pronounced ka-no-to-mi, shin-kin-no-mi, or shin-shi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 18th of the combined sets of the Ten Heavenly Stems and Twelve Earthly Branches. The one before it is {{ill|Kōshin (庚辰)|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin (庚辰)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the one after it is {{ill|Jingo (壬午)|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jingo (壬午)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-yang and Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-yang and Five Elements|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] element {{ill|Kanoto (辛)|lt=Shin (辛)|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of metal, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Mi (巳)|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mi (巳)|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of fire. Under the concept of {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, fire subdues metal (火剋金).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: shinji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhsa (신사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとみ (kanoto-mi) ***Onyomi: しんかのみ (shinka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Snake== A Gregorian calendar year that, when divided by 60, has a remainder of 21 is a Kanotomi year. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanotomi Years''' |- !1st Millennium!!2nd Millennium!!3rd Millennium |- | *21 *81 *141 *201 *261 *321 *381 *441 *501 *561 *621 *681 *741 *801 *861 *921 *981 | *1041 *1101 *1161 *1221 *1281 *1341 *1401 *1461 *1521 *1581 *1641 *1701 *1761 *1821 *1881 *1941 | *2001 *2061 *2121 *2181 *2241 *2301 *2361 *2421 *2481 *2541 *2601 *2661 *2721 *2781 *2841 *2901 *2961 |}
==Months of Yin Metal Snake== In the Gregorian calendar, during years ending in 0 or 5 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kō (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the fourth month (April) is the Kanotomi month. Note that this can refer to the month in the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the “solar term” month (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Snake== A Kanotomi day is associated with the following selection day (選日).
=== Auspicious Days === On a Kanotomi day, it is the fourth day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土#小土|lt_ja=小土|lt=Shōdo|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Kanotomi''' (辛巳) (pronounced ka-no-to-mi, shin-kin-no-mi, or shin-shi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 18th of the combined sets of the Ten Heavenly Stems and Twelve Earthly Branches. The one before it is {{ill|Kōshin (庚辰)|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin (庚辰)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the one after it is {{ill|Jingo (壬午)|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jingo (壬午)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-yang and Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-yang and Five Elements|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] element {{ill|Kanoto (辛)|lt=Shin (辛)|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of metal, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Mi (巳)|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mi (巳)|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of fire. Under the concept of {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, fire subdues metal (火剋金).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: shinji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhsa (신사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとみ (kanoto-mi) ***Onyomi: しんかのみ (shinka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Snake== A Gregorian calendar year that, when divided by 60, has a remainder of 21 is a Kanotomi year. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanotomi Years''' |- !1st Millennium!!2nd Millennium!!3rd Millennium |- | *21 *81 *141 *201 *261 *321 *381 *441 *501 *561 *621 *681 *741 *801 *861 *921 *981 | *1041 *1101 *1161 *1221 *1281 *1341 *1401 *1461 *1521 *1581 *1641 *1701 *1761 *1821 *1881 *1941 | *2001 *2061 *2121 *2181 *2241 *2301 *2361 *2421 *2481 *2541 *2601 *2661 *2721 *2781 *2841 *2901 *2961 |}
==Months of Yin Metal Snake== In the Gregorian calendar, during years ending in 0 or 5 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kō (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the fourth month (April) is the Kanotomi month. Note that this can refer to the month in the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the “solar term” month (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Snake== A Kanotomi day is associated with the following selection day (選日).
=== Auspicious Days === On a Kanotomi day, it is the fourth day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土#小土|lt_ja=小土|lt=Shōdo|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Metall-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de métal]][[hak:Sîn-sṳ]][[ja:辛巳]][[ko:신사 (간지)]][[nds:Metall-Snaak]][[vi:Tân Tỵ]][[za:Sinceih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-sū]][[zh-yue:辛巳]][[zh:辛巳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062057]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Snake|kanji=辛巳|romaji=kanoto mi|onyomi=shinshi|p=xīnsì|w=hsin-ssu|mi=ɕin⁵³ sɨ|y=san1 si6|j=san1 si6|ci=sɐn siː|mc=sin si|oc-bs=sin slɯʔ|qq=}} {{Referencesの明記| date = 2021st year 6月|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Kanotomi''' (辛巳) (pronounced ka-no-to-mi, shin-kin-no-mi, or shin-shi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 18th of the combined sets of the Ten Heavenly Stems and Twelve Earthly Branches. The one before it is {{ill|Kōshin (庚辰)|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin (庚辰)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the one after it is {{ill|Jingo (壬午)|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jingo (壬午)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-yang and Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-yang and Five Elements|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] element {{ill|Kanoto (辛)|lt=Shin (辛)|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of metal, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Mi (巳)|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mi (巳)|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of fire. Under the concept of {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, fire subdues metal (火剋金).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: shinji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhsa (신사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとみ (kanoto-mi) ***Onyomi: しんかのみ (shinka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Snake== A Gregorian calendar year that, when divided by 60, has a remainder of 21 is a Kanotomi year. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanotomi Years''' |- !1st Millennium!!2nd Millennium!!3rd Millennium |- | *21 *81 *141 *201 *261 *321 *381 *441 *501 *561 *621 *681 *741 *801 *861 *921 *981 | *1041 *1101 *1161 *1221 *1281 *1341 *1401 *1461 *1521 *1581 *1641 *1701 *1761 *1821 *1881 *1941 | *2001 *2061 *2121 *2181 *2241 *2301 *2361 *2421 *2481 *2541 *2601 *2661 *2721 *2781 *2841 *2901 *2961 |}
==Months of Yin Metal Snake== In the Gregorian calendar, during years ending in 0 or 5 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kō (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the fourth month (April) is the Kanotomi month. Note that this can refer to the month in the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the “solar term” month (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Snake== A Kanotomi day is associated with the following selection day (選日).
=== Auspicious Days === On a Kanotomi day, it is the fourth day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土#小土|lt_ja=小土|lt=Shōdo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Metall-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de métal]][[hak:Sîn-sṳ]][[ja:辛巳]][[ko:신사 (간지)]][[nds:Metall-Snaak]][[vi:Tân Tỵ]][[za:Sinceih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-sū]][[zh-yue:辛巳]][[zh:辛巳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062057]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Snake|kanji=辛巳|romaji=kanoto mi|onyomi=shinshi|p=xīnsì|w=hsin-ssu|mi=ɕin⁵³ sɨ|y=san1 si6|j=san1 si6|ci=sɐn siː|mc=sin si|oc-bs=sin slɯʔ|qq=}} {{Referencesの明記| date = 2021st year 6月|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Kanotomi''' (辛巳) (pronounced ka-no-to-mi, shin-kin-no-mi, or shin-shi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 18th of the combined sets of the Ten Heavenly Stems and Twelve Earthly Branches. The one before it is {{ill|Kōshin (庚辰)|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin (庚辰)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the one after it is {{ill|Jingo (壬午)|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jingo (壬午)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-yang and Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-yang and Five Elements|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] element {{ill|Kanoto (辛)|lt=Shin (辛)|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of metal, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Mi (巳)|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mi (巳)|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of fire. Under the concept of {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, fire subdues metal (火剋金).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: shinji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhsa (신사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとみ (kanoto-mi) ***Onyomi: しんかのみ (shinka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Snake== A Gregorian calendar year that, when divided by 60, has a remainder of 21 is a Kanotomi year. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanotomi Years''' |- !1st Millennium!!2nd Millennium!!3rd Millennium |- | *21 *81 *141 *201 *261 *321 *381 *441 *501 *561 *621 *681 *741 *801 *861 *921 *981 | *1041 *1101 *1161 *1221 *1281 *1341 *1401 *1461 *1521 *1581 *1641 *1701 *1761 *1821 *1881 *1941 | *2001 *2061 *2121 *2181 *2241 *2301 *2361 *2421 *2481 *2541 *2601 *2661 *2721 *2781 *2841 *2901 *2961 |}
==Months of Yin Metal Snake== In the Gregorian calendar, during years ending in 0 or 5 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kō (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the fourth month (April) is the Kanotomi month. Note that this can refer to the month in the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the “solar term” month (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Snake== A Kanotomi day is associated with the following selection day (選日).
=== Auspicious Days === On a Kanotomi day, it is the fourth day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土#小土|lt_ja=小土|lt=Shōdo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Metall-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de métal]][[hak:Sîn-sṳ]][[ja:辛巳]][[ko:신사 (간지)]][[nds:Metall-Snaak]][[vi:Tân Tỵ]][[za:Sinceih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-sū]][[zh-yue:辛巳]][[zh:辛巳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062057]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Snake|kanji=辛巳|romaji=kanoto mi|onyomi=shinshi|p=xīnsì|w=hsin-ssu|mi=ɕin⁵³ sɨ|y=san1 si6|j=san1 si6|ci=sɐn siː|mc=sin si|oc-bs=sin slɯʔ|qq=}} {{Referencesの明記| date = 2021st year 6月|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Kanotomi''' (辛巳) (pronounced ka-no-to-mi, shin-kin-no-mi, or shin-shi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 18th of the combined sets of the Ten Heavenly Stems and Twelve Earthly Branches. The one before it is {{ill|Kōshin (庚辰)|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin (庚辰)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the one after it is {{ill|Jingo (壬午)|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jingo (壬午)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-yang and Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-yang and Five Elements|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] element {{ill|Kanoto (辛)|lt=Shin (辛)|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of metal, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Mi (巳)|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mi (巳)|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of fire. Under the concept of {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, fire subdues metal (火剋金).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: shinji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhsa (신사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとみ (kanoto-mi) ***Onyomi: しんかのみ (shinka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Snake== A Gregorian calendar year that, when divided by 60, has a remainder of 21 is a Kanotomi year. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanotomi Years''' |- !1st Millennium!!2nd Millennium!!3rd Millennium |- | *21 *81 *141 *201 *261 *321 *381 *441 *501 *561 *621 *681 *741 *801 *861 *921 *981 | *1041 *1101 *1161 *1221 *1281 *1341 *1401 *1461 *1521 *1581 *1641 *1701 *1761 *1821 *1881 *1941 | *2001 *2061 *2121 *2181 *2241 *2301 *2361 *2421 *2481 *2541 *2601 *2661 *2721 *2781 *2841 *2901 *2961 |}
==Months of Yin Metal Snake== In the Gregorian calendar, during years ending in 0 or 5 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kō (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the fourth month (April) is the Kanotomi month. Note that this can refer to the month in the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the “solar term” month (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Snake== A Kanotomi day is associated with the following selection day (選日).
=== Auspicious Days === On a Kanotomi day, it is the fourth day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土#小土|lt_ja=小土|lt=Shōdo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Metall-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de métal]][[hak:Sîn-sṳ]][[ja:辛巳]][[ko:신사 (간지)]][[nds:Metall-Snaak]][[vi:Tân Tỵ]][[za:Sinceih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-sū]][[zh-yue:辛巳]][[zh:辛巳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062057]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Snake|kanji=辛巳|romaji=kanoto mi|onyomi=shinshi|p=xīnsì|w=hsin-ssu|mi=ɕin⁵³ sɨ|y=san1 si6|j=san1 si6|ci=sɐn siː|mc=sin si|oc-bs=sin slɯʔ|qq=}} {{Referencesの明記| date = 2021st year 6月|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Kanotomi''' (辛巳) (pronounced ka-no-to-mi, shin-kin-no-mi, or shin-shi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 18th of the combined sets of the Ten Heavenly Stems and Twelve Earthly Branches. The one before it is {{ill|Kōshin (庚辰)|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin (庚辰)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the one after it is {{ill|Jingo (壬午)|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jingo (壬午)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-yang and Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-yang and Five Elements|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] element {{ill|Kanoto (辛)|lt=Shin (辛)|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of metal, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Mi (巳)|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mi (巳)|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of fire. Under the concept of {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, fire subdues metal (火剋金).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: shinji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhsa (신사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとみ (kanoto-mi) ***Onyomi: しんかのみ (shinka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Snake== A Gregorian calendar year that, when divided by 60, has a remainder of 21 is a Kanotomi year. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanotomi Years''' |- !1st Millennium!!2nd Millennium!!3rd Millennium |- | *21 *81 *141 *201 *261 *321 *381 *441 *501 *561 *621 *681 *741 *801 *861 *921 *981 | *1041 *1101 *1161 *1221 *1281 *1341 *1401 *1461 *1521 *1581 *1641 *1701 *1761 *1821 *1881 *1941 | *2001 *2061 *2121 *2181 *2241 *2301 *2361 *2421 *2481 *2541 *2601 *2661 *2721 *2781 *2841 *2901 *2961 |}
==Months of Yin Metal Snake== In the Gregorian calendar, during years ending in 0 or 5 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kō (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the fourth month (April) is the Kanotomi month. Note that this can refer to the month in the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the “solar term” month (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Snake== A Kanotomi day is associated with the following selection day (選日).
=== Auspicious Days === On a Kanotomi day, it is the fourth day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土#小土|lt_ja=小土|lt=Shōdo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "exagenary cycle comprehensive" to "exagenary cycle"
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Metall-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de métal]][[hak:Sîn-sṳ]][[ja:辛巳]][[ko:신사 (간지)]][[nds:Metall-Snaak]][[vi:Tân Tỵ]][[za:Sinceih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-sū]][[zh-yue:辛巳]][[zh:辛巳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062057]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Snake|kanji=辛巳|romaji=kanoto mi|onyomi=shinshi|p=xīnsì|w=hsin-ssu|mi=ɕin⁵³ sɨ|y=san1 si6|j=san1 si6|ci=sɐn siː|mc=sin si|oc-bs=sin slɯʔ|qq=}} {{Referencesの明記| date = 2021st year 6月|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Kanotomi''' (辛巳) (pronounced ka-no-to-mi, shin-kin-no-mi, or shin-shi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 18th of the combined sets of the Ten Heavenly Stems and Twelve Earthly Branches. The one before it is {{ill|Kōshin (庚辰)|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin (庚辰)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the one after it is {{ill|Jingo (壬午)|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jingo (壬午)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-yang and Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-yang and Five Elements|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] element {{ill|Kanoto (辛)|lt=Shin (辛)|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of metal, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Mi (巳)|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mi (巳)|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of fire. Under the concept of {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, fire subdues metal (火剋金).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: shinji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhsa (신사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとみ (kanoto-mi) ***Onyomi: しんかのみ (shinka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Snake== A Gregorian calendar year that, when divided by 60, has a remainder of 21 is a Kanotomi year. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanotomi Years''' |- !1st Millennium!!2nd Millennium!!3rd Millennium |- | *21 *81 *141 *201 *261 *321 *381 *441 *501 *561 *621 *681 *741 *801 *861 *921 *981 | *1041 *1101 *1161 *1221 *1281 *1341 *1401 *1461 *1521 *1581 *1641 *1701 *1761 *1821 *1881 *1941 | *2001 *2061 *2121 *2181 *2241 *2301 *2361 *2421 *2481 *2541 *2601 *2661 *2721 *2781 *2841 *2901 *2961 |}
==Months of Yin Metal Snake== In the Gregorian calendar, during years ending in 0 or 5 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kō (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the fourth month (April) is the Kanotomi month. Note that this can refer to the month in the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the “solar term” month (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Snake== A Kanotomi day is associated with the following selection day (選日).
=== Auspicious Days === On a Kanotomi day, it is the fourth day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土#小土|lt_ja=小土|lt=Shōdo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Metall-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de métal]][[hak:Sîn-sṳ]][[ja:辛巳]][[ko:신사 (간지)]][[nds:Metall-Snaak]][[vi:Tân Tỵ]][[za:Sinceih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-sū]][[zh-yue:辛巳]][[zh:辛巳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062057]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Snake|kanji=辛巳|romaji=kanoto mi|onyomi=shinshi|p=xīnsì|w=hsin-ssu|mi=ɕin⁵³ sɨ|y=san1 si6|j=san1 si6|ci=sɐn siː|mc=sin si|oc-bs=sin slɯʔ|qq=}} {{Referencesの明記| date = 2021st year 6月|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Kanotomi''' (辛巳) (pronounced ka-no-to-mi, shin-kin-no-mi, or shin-shi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 18th of the combined sets of the Ten Heavenly Stems and Twelve Earthly Branches. The one before it is {{ill|Kōshin (庚辰)|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin (庚辰)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the one after it is {{ill|Jingo (壬午)|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jingo (壬午)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-yang and Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-yang and Five Elements|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] element {{ill|Kanoto (辛)|lt=Shin (辛)|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of metal, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Mi (巳)|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mi (巳)|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of fire. Under the concept of {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, fire subdues metal (火剋金).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: shinji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhsa (신사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとみ (kanoto-mi) ***Onyomi: しんかのみ (shinka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Snake== A Gregorian calendar year that, when divided by 60, has a remainder of 21 is a Kanotomi year. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanotomi Years''' |- !1st Millennium!!2nd Millennium!!3rd Millennium |- | *21 *81 *141 *201 *261 *321 *381 *441 *501 *561 *621 *681 *741 *801 *861 *921 *981 | *1041 *1101 *1161 *1221 *1281 *1341 *1401 *1461 *1521 *1581 *1641 *1701 *1761 *1821 *1881 *1941 | *2001 *2061 *2121 *2181 *2241 *2301 *2361 *2421 *2481 *2541 *2601 *2661 *2721 *2781 *2841 *2901 *2961 |}
==Months of Yin Metal Snake== In the Gregorian calendar, during years ending in 0 or 5 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kō (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the fourth month (April) is the Kanotomi month. Note that this can refer to the month in the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the “solar term” month (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Snake== A Kanotomi day is associated with the following selection day (選日).
=== Auspicious Days === On a Kanotomi day, it is the fourth day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土#小土|lt_ja=小土|lt=Shōdo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Metall-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de métal]][[hak:Sîn-sṳ]][[ja:辛巳]][[ko:신사 (간지)]][[nds:Metall-Snaak]][[vi:Tân Tỵ]][[za:Sinceih]][[zh_min_nan:Sin-sū]][[zh_yue:辛巳]][[zh:辛巳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Metall-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de métal]][[hak:Sîn-sṳ]][[ja:辛巳]][[ko:신사 (간지)]][[nds:Metall-Snaak]][[vi:Tân Tỵ]][[za:Sinceih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-sū]][[zh-yue:辛巳]][[zh:辛巳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062057]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Snake|kanji=辛巳|romaji=kanoto mi|onyomi=shinshi|p=xīnsì|w=hsin-ssu|mi=ɕin⁵³ sɨ|y=san1 si6|j=san1 si6|ci=sɐn siː|mc=sin si|oc-bs=sin slɯʔ|qq=}} {{Referencesの明記| date = 2021st year 6月|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Kanotomi''' (辛巳) (pronounced ka-no-to-mi, shin-kin-no-mi, or shin-shi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 18th of the combined sets of the Ten Heavenly Stems and Twelve Earthly Branches. The one before it is {{ill|Kōshin (庚辰)|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin (庚辰)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the one after it is {{ill|Jingo (壬午)|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jingo (壬午)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-yang and Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-yang and Five Elements|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] element {{ill|Kanoto (辛)|lt=Shin (辛)|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of metal, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Mi (巳)|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mi (巳)|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of fire. Under the concept of {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, fire subdues metal (火剋金).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: shinji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhsa (신사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとみ (kanoto-mi) ***Onyomi: しんかのみ (shinka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Snake== A Gregorian calendar year that, when divided by 60, has a remainder of 21 is a Kanotomi year. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanotomi Years''' |- !1st Millennium!!2nd Millennium!!3rd Millennium |- | *21 *81 *141 *201 *261 *321 *381 *441 *501 *561 *621 *681 *741 *801 *861 *921 *981 | *1041 *1101 *1161 *1221 *1281 *1341 *1401 *1461 *1521 *1581 *1641 *1701 *1761 *1821 *1881 *1941 | *2001 *2061 *2121 *2181 *2241 *2301 *2361 *2421 *2481 *2541 *2601 *2661 *2721 *2781 *2841 *2901 *2961 |}
==Months of Yin Metal Snake== In the Gregorian calendar, during years ending in 0 or 5 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kō (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the fourth month (April) is the Kanotomi month. Note that this can refer to the month in the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the “solar term” month (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Snake== A Kanotomi day is associated with the following selection day (選日).
=== Auspicious Days === On a Kanotomi day, it is the fourth day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土#小土|lt_ja=小土|lt=Shōdo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Metall-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de métal]][[hak:Sîn-sṳ]][[ja:辛巳]][[ko:신사 (간지)]][[nds:Metall-Snaak]][[vi:Tân Tỵ]][[za:Sinceih]][[zh_min_nan:Sin-sū]][[zh_yue:辛巳]][[zh:辛巳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Metall-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de métal]][[hak:Sîn-sṳ]][[ja:辛巳]][[ko:신사 (간지)]][[nds:Metall-Snaak]][[vi:Tân Tỵ]][[za:Sinceih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-sū]][[zh-yue:辛巳]][[zh:辛巳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062057]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Snake|kanji=辛巳|romaji=kanoto mi|onyomi=shinshi|p=xīnsì|w=hsin-ssu|mi=ɕin⁵³ sɨ|y=san1 si6|j=san1 si6|ci=sɐn siː|mc=sin si|oc-bs=sin slɯʔ|qq=}} {{Referencesの明記| date = 2021st year 6月|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Kanotomi''' (辛巳) (pronounced ka-no-to-mi, shin-kin-no-mi, or shin-shi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 18th of the combined sets of the Ten Heavenly Stems and Twelve Earthly Branches. The one before it is {{ill|Kōshin (庚辰)|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin (庚辰)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the one after it is {{ill|Jingo (壬午)|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jingo (壬午)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-yang and Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-yang and Five Elements|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] element {{ill|Kanoto (辛)|lt=Shin (辛)|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of metal, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Mi (巳)|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mi (巳)|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of fire. Under the concept of {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, fire subdues metal (火剋金).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: shinji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhsa (신사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとみ (kanoto-mi) ***Onyomi: しんかのみ (shinka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Snake== A Gregorian calendar year that, when divided by 60, has a remainder of 21 is a Kanotomi year. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanotomi Years''' |- !1st Millennium!!2nd Millennium!!3rd Millennium |- | *21 *81 *141 *201 *261 *321 *381 *441 *501 *561 *621 *681 *741 *801 *861 *921 *981 | *1041 *1101 *1161 *1221 *1281 *1341 *1401 *1461 *1521 *1581 *1641 *1701 *1761 *1821 *1881 *1941 | *2001 *2061 *2121 *2181 *2241 *2301 *2361 *2421 *2481 *2541 *2601 *2661 *2721 *2781 *2841 *2901 *2961 |}
==Months of Yin Metal Snake== In the Gregorian calendar, during years ending in 0 or 5 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kō (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the fourth month (April) is the Kanotomi month. Note that this can refer to the month in the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the “solar term” month (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Snake== A Kanotomi day is associated with the following selection day (選日).
=== Auspicious Days === On a Kanotomi day, it is the fourth day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土#小土|lt_ja=小土|lt=Shōdo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Metall-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de métal]][[hak:Sîn-sṳ]][[ja:辛巳]][[ko:신사 (간지)]][[nds:Metall-Snaak]][[vi:Tân Tỵ]][[za:Sinceih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-sū]][[zh-yue:辛巳]][[zh:辛巳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Metall-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de métal]][[hak:Sîn-sṳ]][[ja:辛巳]][[ko:신사 (간지)]][[nds:Metall-Snaak]][[vi:Tân Tỵ]][[za:Sinceih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-sū]][[zh-yue:辛巳]][[zh:辛巳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062057]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Snake|kanji=辛巳|romaji=kanoto mi|onyomi=shinshi|p=xīnsì|w=hsin-ssu|mi=ɕin⁵³ sɨ|y=san1 si6|j=san1 si6|ci=sɐn siː|mc=sin si|oc-bs=sin slɯʔ|qq=}} {{Referencesの明記| date = 2021st year 6月|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Kanotomi''' (辛巳) (pronounced ka-no-to-mi, shin-kin-no-mi, or shin-shi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 18th of the combined sets of the Ten Heavenly Stems and Twelve Earthly Branches. The one before it is {{ill|Kōshin (庚辰)|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin (庚辰)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the one after it is {{ill|Jingo (壬午)|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jingo (壬午)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-yang and Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-yang and Five Elements|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] element {{ill|Kanoto (辛)|lt=Shin (辛)|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of metal, and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Mi (巳)|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mi (巳)|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of fire. Under the concept of {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, fire subdues metal (火剋金).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: shinji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhsa (신사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとみ (kanoto-mi) ***Onyomi: しんかのみ (shinka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Snake== A Gregorian calendar year that, when divided by 60, has a remainder of 21 is a Kanotomi year. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanotomi Years''' |- !1st Millennium!!2nd Millennium!!3rd Millennium |- | *21 *81 *141 *201 *261 *321 *381 *441 *501 *561 *621 *681 *741 *801 *861 *921 *981 | *1041 *1101 *1161 *1221 *1281 *1341 *1401 *1461 *1521 *1581 *1641 *1701 *1761 *1821 *1881 *1941 | *2001 *2061 *2121 *2181 *2241 *2301 *2361 *2421 *2481 *2541 *2601 *2661 *2721 *2781 *2841 *2901 *2961 |}
==Months of Yin Metal Snake== In the Gregorian calendar, during years ending in 0 or 5 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kō (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the fourth month (April) is the Kanotomi month. Note that this can refer to the month in the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the “solar term” month (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Snake== A Kanotomi day is associated with the following selection day (選日).
=== Auspicious Days === On a Kanotomi day, it is the fourth day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土#小土|lt_ja=小土|lt=Shōdo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

Note that this can refer to the month in the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the “solar term” month (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Bōshu}}).
==Days of Yin Metal Snake== A Kanotomi day is associated with the following selection day (選日).
=== Auspicious Days === On a Kanotomi day, it is the fourth day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土#小土|lt_ja=小土|lt=Shōdo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Metall-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de métal]][[hak:Sîn-sṳ]][[ja:辛巳]][[ko:신사 (간지)]][[nds:Metall-Snaak]][[vi:Tân Tỵ]][[za:Sinceih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-sū]][[zh-yue:辛巳]][[zh:辛巳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Metall-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de métal]][[hak:Sîn-sṳ]][[ja:辛巳]][[ko:신사 (간지)]][[nds:Metall-Snaak]][[vi:Tân Tỵ]][[za:Sinceih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-sū]][[zh-yue:辛巳]][[zh:辛巳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062057]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Snake|kanji=辛巳|romaji=kanoto mi|onyomi=shinshi|p=xīnsì|w=hsin-ssu|mi=ɕin⁵³ sɨ|y=san1 si6|j=san1 si6|ci=sɐn siː|mc=sin si|oc-bs=sin slɯʔ|qq=}} {{Referencesの明記| date = 2021st year 6月|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Kanotomi''' (辛巳) (pronounced ka-no-to-mi, shin-kin-no-mi, or shin-shi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 18th of the combined sets of the Ten Heavenly Stems and Twelve Earthly Branches. The one before it is {{ill|Kōshin (庚辰)|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin (庚辰)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the one after it is {{ill|Jingo (壬午)|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jingo (壬午)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-yang and Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-yang and Five Elements|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} element {{ill|Kanoto (辛)|lt=Shin (辛)|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of metal, and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}} element {{ill|Mi (巳)|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mi (巳)|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of fire. Under the concept of {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, fire subdues metal (火剋金).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: shinji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhsa (신사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとみ (kanoto-mi) ***Onyomi: しんかのみ (shinka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Snake== A Gregorian calendar year that, when divided by 60, has a remainder of 21 is a Kanotomi year. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanotomi Years''' |- !1st Millennium!!2nd Millennium!!3rd Millennium |- | *21 *81 *141 *201 *261 *321 *381 *441 *501 *561 *621 *681 *741 *801 *861 *921 *981 | *1041 *1101 *1161 *1221 *1281 *1341 *1401 *1461 *1521 *1581 *1641 *1701 *1761 *1821 *1881 *1941 | *2001 *2061 *2121 *2181 *2241 *2301 *2361 *2421 *2481 *2541 *2601 *2661 *2721 *2781 *2841 *2901 *2961 |}
==Months of Yin Metal Snake== In the Gregorian calendar, during years ending in 0 or 5 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kō (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the fourth month (April) is the Kanotomi month. Note that this can refer to the month in the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the “solar term” month (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Bōshu}}).
==Days of Yin Metal Snake== A Kanotomi day is associated with the following selection day (選日).
=== Auspicious Days === On a Kanotomi day, it is the fourth day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土#小土|lt_ja=小土|lt=Shōdo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

According to the {{ill|Yin-yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-yang and Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-yang and Five Elements|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} element {{ill|Kanoto (辛)|lt=Shin (辛)|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of metal, and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}} element {{ill|Mi (巳)|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mi (巳)|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of fire. Under the concept of {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, fire subdues metal (火剋金).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: shinji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhsa (신사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとみ (kanoto-mi) ***Onyomi: しんかのみ (shinka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Snake== A Gregorian calendar year that, when divided by 60, has a remainder of 21 is a Kanotomi year. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanotomi Years''' |- !1st Millennium!!2nd Millennium!!3rd Millennium |- | *21 *81 *141 *201 *261 *321 *381 *441 *501 *561 *621 *681 *741 *801 *861 *921 *981 | *1041 *1101 *1161 *1221 *1281 *1341 *1401 *1461 *1521 *1581 *1641 *1701 *1761 *1821 *1881 *1941 | *2001 *2061 *2121 *2181 *2241 *2301 *2361 *2421 *2481 *2541 *2601 *2661 *2721 *2781 *2841 *2901 *2961 |}
==Months of Yin Metal Snake== In the Gregorian calendar, during years ending in 0 or 5 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kō (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the fourth month (April) is the Kanotomi month. Note that this can refer to the month in the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the “solar term” month (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Bōshu}}).
==Days of Yin Metal Snake== A Kanotomi day is associated with the following selection day (選日).
=== Auspicious Days === On a Kanotomi day, it is the fourth day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土#小土|lt_ja=小土|lt=Shōdo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Kanotomi''' (辛巳) (pronounced ka-no-to-mi, shin-kin-no-mi, or shin-shi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 18th of the combined sets of the Ten Heavenly Stems and Twelve Earthly Branches. The one before it is {{ill|Kōshin (庚辰)|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin (庚辰)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the one after it is {{ill|Jingo (壬午)|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jingo (壬午)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-yang and Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-yang and Five Elements|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} element {{ill|Kanoto (辛)|lt=Shin (辛)|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of metal, and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}} element {{ill|Mi (巳)|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mi (巳)|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of fire. Under the concept of {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, fire subdues metal (火剋金).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: shinji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhsa (신사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとみ (kanoto-mi) ***Onyomi: しんかのみ (shinka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Snake== A Gregorian calendar year that, when divided by 60, has a remainder of 21 is a Kanotomi year. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanotomi Years''' |- !1st Millennium!!2nd Millennium!!3rd Millennium |- | *21 *81 *141 *201 *261 *321 *381 *441 *501 *561 *621 *681 *741 *801 *861 *921 *981 | *1041 *1101 *1161 *1221 *1281 *1341 *1401 *1461 *1521 *1581 *1641 *1701 *1761 *1821 *1881 *1941 | *2001 *2061 *2121 *2181 *2241 *2301 *2361 *2421 *2481 *2541 *2601 *2661 *2721 *2781 *2841 *2901 *2961 |}

Note that this can refer to the month in the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the “solar term” month (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Bōshu}}).

'''Kanotomi''' (辛巳) (pronounced ka-no-to-mi, shin-kin-no-mi, or shin-shi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 18th of the combined sets of the Ten Heavenly Stems and Twelve Earthly Branches. The one before it is {{ill|Kōshin (庚辰)|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin (庚辰)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the one after it is {{ill|Jingo (壬午)|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jingo (壬午)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-yang and Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-yang and Five Elements|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} element {{ill|Kanoto (辛)|lt=Shin (辛)|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of metal, and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} element {{ill|Mi (巳)|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mi (巳)|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} is the yin aspect of fire. Under the concept of {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, fire subdues metal (火剋金).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: shinji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhsa (신사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとみ (kanoto-mi) ***Onyomi: しんかのみ (shinka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Snake== A Gregorian calendar year that, when divided by 60, has a remainder of 21 is a Kanotomi year. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanotomi Years''' |- !1st Millennium!!2nd Millennium!!3rd Millennium |- | *21 *81 *141 *201 *261 *321 *381 *441 *501 *561 *621 *681 *741 *801 *861 *921 *981 | *1041 *1101 *1161 *1221 *1281 *1341 *1401 *1461 *1521 *1581 *1641 *1701 *1761 *1821 *1881 *1941 | *2001 *2061 *2121 *2181 *2241 *2301 *2361 *2421 *2481 *2541 *2601 *2661 *2721 *2781 *2841 *2901 *2961 |}
==Months of Yin Metal Snake== In the Gregorian calendar, during years ending in 0 or 5 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kō (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the fourth month (April) is the Kanotomi month. Note that this can refer to the month in the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the “solar term” month (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Bōshu|1=Mangzhong}}).
==Days of Yin Metal Snake== A Kanotomi day is associated with the following selection day (選日).
=== Auspicious Days === On a Kanotomi day, it is the fourth day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土#小土|lt_ja=小土|lt=Shōdo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}
